values.1: Merchant receipts for all authorized transactions
values.2: Merchant receipts for all authorized, rejected or aborted transactions
values.3: Merchant receipts for authorized transactions with signature on paper as CVM
values.4: Merchant receipts for authorized transactions with signature on paper as CVM and for all rejected or aborted transactions

values.1: Customer receipts for authorized transactions, printing may be aborted
values.2: Customer receipts for authorized, rejected or aborted transactions, printing may be aborted
values.3: Customer receipts for authorized transactions, printing may NOT be aborted
values.4: Customer receipts for authorized, rejected or aborted transactions, printing may NOT be aborted

values.0: Print masked PAN, don't print card expiry date
values.1: Print masked PAN and card expiry date

values.0: Mode 1: 1st GAC: CDA for ARQC, 2nd GAC: CDA for TC

values.1: DCC cless allowed if amount > CVM limit and online auth

values.0: Standard display text, no fall-back to technology selection
values.1: Request to use contact reader (display text #2) and return to technology selection if PIN input is possible. Otherwise inform that PIN is not possible (display text #3) and no fall-back to technology selection
